Name: End the Undying
Description: Defeat the Lich lurking at the end of the Hollow Crypt.

Name: Wraith Problem
Description: Kill the Wraith in the Chamber of the Hollow Crypt!

Name: Disaperance of Townsfolk
Description: The Trolls and Goblins in the Deep Caves are getting restless, kill some to keep them at bay.

Name: Squeaky Problem
Description: The bats in the deeper tunnels have grown aggressive — travellers report being dive-bombed the moment they leave the main passage. Clear some of them out.

Name: Rocky Nuisance
Description: Stone Imps have been pilfering tools and supplies left near the cave entrance. Find them in the deeper tunnels and put a stop to it.

Name: What Lies Beneath
Description: Something is raising the dead in the ancient chamber below the abyss passage. The Bone Crawlers are spreading upward — deal with them before they reach the main tunnels.

Name: Unsave Roads
Description: The Maka Maka make the northwest road between Lumina and Ceralith unsave for travelers, we have to push them back!

Name: Dangerous Boars
Description: The Townsfolk is worried about the Mossy Boars, please kille a few so they can feel save again.
